_comment: Frozen baseline for check-design-tokens.mjs. Counts are total raw color literals across app/ and lib/ (excluding tests, generated code, SVG illustration files). hex includes #fff/#000 (kept-raw per docs/design-tokens.md), brand mark color, and SVG fills. rgba includes white-overlay glass effects with varying alphas, dark surface scrims, and one-off effect colors. The check fails if either count grows above this baseline. If you intentionally add a raw color, update this baseline in the same commit and explain why in the commit message. Bumped 2026-05-08 to lock in the dark-mode rebalance + prior consistency-infra wins (hex 437 → 316, rgba 679 → 159). 2026-05-07: hex 316 → 315 (payroll zebra-stripe black bar fix swapped #191c24 → var(--surface-pressed)). 2026-05-11: hex 315 → 319 (blitz_request_decided notification email blockquote uses inline hex literals — CSS variables don't survive Gmail/Outlook; matches existing renderNotificationEmail pattern in mentions/handoff emails). 2026-05-11: hex 319 → 334 (deal_submitted_rep + deal_submitted_admin email templates — table styling for commission breakdown rows uses inline hex literals per the same Gmail/Outlook constraint). 2026-05-11: hex 334 → 330 (removed kilo margin row from admin email per policy — margin never travels through email; admin sees it in-app only).
